title: Bright & Homely Travel Bottel Set 5PCS, Travel Bottles Set for Toiletries Empty Refillable Travel Bottles Clear Plastic Travel Liquid Containers
features: Travel Bottle Set, Shampoo, Cosmetic, Lotion, Body Wash, Makeup, Shower Gel, Hand Soap
description: Product description ⦁ 5-Piece Set: Includes 5 reusable bottles, perfect for packing a variety of liquids like shampoos, conditioners, lotions, and more. ⦁ Leak-Proof Design: Each bottle is equipped with a secure, tight-sealing cap to prevent leaks and spills during travel. ⦁ TSA-Approved: Meets airline carry-on regulations for liquids, making it easy to pack for flights. ⦁ Durable & Lightweight: Made from high-quality, BPA-free plastic, this set is both lightweight and long-lasting. ⦁ Compact & Portable: The compact size of each bottle fits easily into luggage, backpacks, or gym bags. ⦁ Easy to Refill & Clean: Wide mouth openings for easy refilling and cleaning. Safety Warning Ensure Caps are Securely Closed
